scene: Stan the round-headed dot-eyed stickman asleep in bed with a sleep mask, a watch reading 8 HRS, a wall clock, flat dark navy bedroom filling the tall frame, big black caps 8 HOURS.
Stan slumped face-down on an office desk at 3:00, three z's, droopy dot-eyes, flat beige office filling the tall frame, big black caps 3 PM ZOMBIE.
Stan flat on his back in bed wide awake, dot-eyes huge, a glowing phone on his face, wall clock 11:00, flat dark navy filling the tall frame, big black caps WIDE AWAKE.
Stan shrugging beside a bed with a thick red X over it, flat grey filling the tall frame, big black caps NOT THE SLEEP.
A mysterious second clock stamped 2 with a big red question mark, a small puzzled Stan, flat grey filling the tall frame, big black caps A SECOND CLOCK.
